review_title: Excellent Crawler for SEOs and Geeks Alike - Automate and Relax
description: The best thing after their web application, hands down, is their support team. I have a lot of anxiety, as you may have noticed. I have ranted to customer support on more than one occasion. And they solve my problems and my troubles every time. I feel like I am getting the better deal.
author: Bradley L.
pros: Labrika runs full keyword rankings, web crawling, on-page optimization editors, and more in the cloud. You can shut your browser; nothing is taken from your computer's resources. This sounds like a little thing until you have to run crawlers on massive sites. If in a pinch, you could run this program on your phone. I don't recommend it because it has too much information, but you "could start the crawler" and then watch Netflix on the flight instead of sweating until your on-site meeting. As I said, it is such a relief.
cons: I purchased the most expensive program on Appsumo and would buy even more if they offered it. Because there is no more extensive program, I send an additional $20 -30 for ranking reporting. Trust me, it is worth it. Peace of mind is so rare these days. Labrika comes through time and time again.

review_title: Labrika tool
description: it was good experience using labrika for my work
author: Mathurshana J.
pros: Easy to use, amazing customer support and etc
cons: nothing, payment gateway got a issue but resolve within 24 hours
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good software living in an unfit body!
description: Reliable, growing nicely, but ugly and uninspiring. Needs a bit of tender loving care.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's very comprehensive. Evolving nicely.
cons: Having to use other content optimisation tools is very frustrating. It would be great to have all SEO under one app. The user interface (dashboard) is very bland, uninspiring and, at times, extremely cumbersome. It can be very overwhelming.

review_title: An Inexpensive SEO Application with a Lot of Potential
description: Overall, Labrika is a quality product that isn't nearly as expensive as their competitors. It takes some time to learn their application and how to navigate it, but that's a reasonable trade-off for the price point.
author: Brandon S.
pros: Labrika has a lot of functionality that its competitors do not have. You can gain a lot of insight and make effective changes based on their advice.
cons: The UI is not very good, in my opinion. It is often hard to find what you are looking for. Some of the configurations aren't very intuitive.

review_title: One of the best SEO Software in the market
description: I've been quite happy using this software. It helped me rank my webpages in Google.
author: Bikram K. S.
pros: I am using Labrika for more than 6 months now. This is one of the most cost-effective on-page and technical SEO software in the market. This is also has a fairly adequate rank tracking software in the market. The content optimization feature is a hidden gem. You can use it to optimize your landing page for the chosen keywords or group of keywords. The scoring system the SEO software uses helps you get a better ranking. The software also tells you the keywords your website already ranks for. It also helps with competitor anayssis in the chosen market.
cons: Missing keyword suggestion and keyword volume feature missing, but as it is a part of the roadmap, I hope to see it soon.

review_title: LABRIKA review, feature packed SEO tool
description: I am especially happy with how the support team is quick to respond and also "respects" different people's different experiences in this field. They carefully listen and analyze the given feedback every time and if it is suitable they put it on the roadmap for implementation to make the tool even more useful (powerful).
author: Adam H.
pros: Feature rich Technical site and SEO Audit.
cons: As it is so feature packed, it seems hard to navigate sometimes, and many of these features are hidden away behind many "clicks" and not easy to even know of their existence.

review_title: Excellent SEO audit tool
description: SEO audit. With one click I can scan entire website, see main issues (like no title, wrong meta tags, etc.) All this over thousands of pages.
author: Klemen V.
pros: Audit features and pdf report - hands done. I start the audit and come back to read the report.
cons: I am using other content optimisation tools.

review_title: A Truly Time Saving SEO Tool
description: I've been in the SEO industry for over 10 years now and am always testing new software. Labrika saves me time and is robust and informative enough to pass actionable tasks to my team. I would buy it again, no regrets.
author: Darren H.
pros: Labrika saves our team countless hours on SEO auditing. The user interface is clean and gives an instant overview of our keywords, technical analysis and quick and actionable tasks to improve website visibility.
cons: The reporting and sharing features could have more options.

review_title: Complete Website Optimization Audit and Keyword Ranking Tracking
description: Labrika has allowed us to provide our clients important information about how their site is performing but from a technical point of view and on search rankings. It also helps us capture new clients by showing them how their site can be improved. The reports are very complete. Their sharing options lets us share parts of the reports for our clients. For example, we can send them how their site is ranking for certain keywords on Google for each locale they could be interested in.
author: Alfredo J.
pros: We can very quickly deploy our weekly audits for the websites our agency services. This audits have been indispensable in order to fix site errors and to track rankings. The price vs. value is very generous compared to other competitors.
cons: The UI and reports can be a bit overwhelming for our clients if sent as is. However we can share parts of the report as needed.

review_title: One of the best SEO tools with affordable pricing and wonderful customer support
author: Firoz K.
pros: I was struggling to get organic traffic and rank higher in search engine results, but Labrika changed all that. Not only is their pricing affordable, but they also provide 24/7 customer support which is really helpful. I would suggest Labrika if you're looking to increase your organic traffic and rankings!
cons: Labrika should post regular blogs and newsletters about the use of tools along with updated content on youtube to help their user to use them more effectively

review_title: Indepth SEO Analysis and Rank Tracking
description: I am using Labrika to generate in-depth technical SEO reports.
author: Afroz A.
pros: In-depth technical SEO audit for websites Rank Tracking is useful
cons: The tool needs quality UI/UX development.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Labrika is Your All-In-One SEO Tool
description: I've had a great experience with Labrika. It's got all the SEO tools you need.
author: Heather R.
pros: I love that it helps me manage my website all from one dashboard. It's easy to see my competitors and work on the SEO insights that Labrika gives me to improve my site and rankings.
cons: There are so many features that it can be overwhelming but that's a good thing. It's a tool with everything you need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helpful tool for website analysis
description: Labrika is a helpful tool for analyzing websites and identifying potential issues. The website audit has saved me many hours and helped me to find some small details that need to be fixed or cleaned up.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: A like the full website audit. I can run the report at any time and after it's scanned the site I'll get a detailed report with any potential SEO issues that are found. Depending on the site, going through the report can be quite tedious, but it's great for identifying potential issues. I try to run an audit of each of my sites every six months just to be proactive and see if there are any issues.
cons: There's really nothing specific that I dislike. I don't use all of the features of Labrika, but that's mostly because I use other tools for some of those functions, like keyword rank tracking.

review_title: Solid SEO Platform
description: I have really grown to love Labrika. It's got a great set of tools for Search Engine Optimisation. I especially like the content optimisation and general site audits.
author: Jay K.
pros: Labrika is very feature-rich, it's got allot of tools under the hood.
cons: I guess the dashboard could be improved a little, I feel like there is a bit of a learning curve but that's just because of the sheer amount of features.

review_title: Excellent value to performance
description: Overall, I'm very happy with Labrika. It has almost all of the features of a very expensive platform, but with a much smaller price tag. I like that you can grow over time with your plan. if you have a smaller website, no need to buy the full-priced suite like many major competitors.
author: Shawn P.
pros: I love how easy it is to just get in and start auditing.
cons: Whitelabel reports are minimal. I'd like to see a lot of options here to build out sophisticated reports.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for SEO audits and on-page SEO
description: We used to analyze and improve our old posts, and now we use it to analyze our rankings and find opportunities for improvement.
author: David S.
pros: Labrika has a huge amount of features, so it easily replaces some independent tools (like keyword tracking, SEO audits, on-page SEO, etc...)
cons: The navigation is somewhat not intuitive, so it is difficult to take advantage of all of the features.

review_title: Excellent tool to provide valuable insights
description: Overall I think Labrika is a great SEO tool and good value for money, would recommend
author: David C.
pros: Labrika is very easy to use and understand, the interface is easy to navigate and the results are accurate
cons: It would be nice to have a little more control over the SEO Audits, some things show as errors even though they aren't, it would be nice to permanently 'ignore' these.

review_title: Great SEO keyword tracking software
description: I have been using for past 6 months we were impressed with the speed and accuracy also reporting feature which was indepth
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I loved the accuracy of the keyword tracking based on regions, we were surpised and impresed with accuracy as we tried other tools and Labrika outperformed them all.
cons: Some of SEO errors were off as I consulted them with SEO specialist, technical errors have to be looked into. Would have loved an option for keyword research.

review_title: Great Tool That Brings Action Items To Improve SEO
description: Overall, Labrika has been a very valuable tool that has motivated me to focus on action items on my SEO plan, such as improving the technical aspects of my website.
author: Michael K.
pros: I have received a lot of valuable insight that has allowed us to focus on bringing up our search engine rankings
cons: The UI can be plain vanilla, and it can even be a bit more comprehensive such as suggesting anchor text in backlinks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I am a sucker for tools that make my life easier, and this is one of those tools.
description: It will give you a report with all the issues it found along with a simple explanation tooltip for each error. The tool is modern and easy to use, so if you have a small site that you want to make sure has no SEO errors on it, you should give it a try.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SEO is a complicated beast, and you can't expect to rank without a solid SEO audit. Labrika helps by auditing your site and pointing out all the common SEO issues that are keeping you from ranking.
cons: It gives you such an in-deep review that you can get overwhelmed by the amount of work your site needs to be perfect.

review_title: A must-have for all technical SEOs
description: Labrika has sped up the amount of time it takes to do a technical site audit. It makes resolving site health issues extremely straightforward.
author: Jonathan N.
pros: Labrika makes doing technical SEO easy. It's easy to use (unlike Screaming Frog), and the reports are both actionable and easily understandable.
cons: The UI takes some getting used to, as some of the features aren't displayed intuitively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Labrika - Get in depth report of your SEO
author: Hue T.
pros: Labrika allows me to get an in depth report of my SEO. It's like the swiss army knife of technical SEO. It shows the top 10 in keywords, organic competitors, site rankings, and all aspects of SEO you're concern about.
cons: The UI/UX needs a little refresher. But it still works as is.

review_title: Best technical seo audit tool
author: Jayadeep H.
pros: The tool is super useful and I found loads of stuff wrong with my sites that I previously didn't know about.
cons: One thing I would like to see is would be a more modern UI. Otherwise, every thing is good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great insights and many features
description: Great product with huge potential, like the content optimizer a lot, looks very promising for the future releases that will come. Do not use it for rank tracking
author: Remco T.
pros: The software is presenting a lot of details on the website you use it for Great SEO Audit and crawl information Like the Content Optimizer feature, the main reason to have the product next to other similar products
cons: Interface and set up for the product take a bit more time to get used with it Difficult setup for the Keyword grouping feature Strange way of setting up the maximum pages to scan
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Cannot beat this for thoroughness and price.
author: Jack P.
pros: Labrika is extremely thorough. When we first started using this we uncovered almost 300 errors we were unaware of. It looks through everything and creates reports in a very easy to understand and concise manner. It has helped us learn exactly what a good website needs to be and fine-tune everything so that the user experience top notch.
cons: The only thing missing would be helpful for us would be monitoring of back links. Although I’ve been in touch with Support and they say that feature may be coming in the near future. That would make the software pretty much all we need.
